movie.actors: Marlon Wayans, Brad Dourif, Esther Scott, Debra Jo Rupp
movie.plot: Darryl Witherspoon is a young black college student who wants to win annual junior analyst competition, which can land him a job in a big brokerage company. He becomes a guinea pig for the drug developed at the college which is promised to heighten all senses by ten times.
movie.title: Senseless
